response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON accurately noted that this segment contains dialogue and crowd engagement without vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used to identify the performers (Chloe, La+, Koyori, and Iroha); all dialogue and on-screen text were manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely synchronized with the vocal bursts. Aggressive truncation was applied between rapid lines to prevent cascading delays, and the final visual announcement was subtitled for its duration during the instrumental transition.

subtitles.original: じゃあここからね、さっき言ってた通り
subtitles.english: Well then, from here, just as we were saying earlier...

subtitles.original: 本当のミッション始まりますなね！
subtitles.english: The true mission is starting, isn't it!

subtitles.original: おーい！まだ声出せるよなー！
subtitles.english: Hey! You can still make some noise, right?!

subtitles.original: ここにいる全員、そして配信民！
subtitles.english: Everyone here, and those watching the stream!

subtitles.original: ファーストミッション、ここからが本番だ！
subtitles.english: First Mission, the real show starts now!

subtitles.original:
無料パートは終了いたしました！
ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english:
[The free part has ended!
Thank you for watching!]
